meta.description: Case studies and results from completed projects.

hero.label: References
hero.title: Case Studies & Results
hero.subtitle: It's not just the measure that matters. It's how everything works together.

intro: Depending on the starting point, the strongest lever may lie in external image, visibility or staff recruitment. For us, it's never just about the individual measure, but about how a functioning system with real impact can emerge from it.

cases.situation: Haus Hohensolms gGmbH is a social care facility in a rural area with an important social mission. Like many organisations outside urban centres, the challenge was to become more visible online as an employer and more accessible to suitable candidates.
cases.challenge: The goal was to strengthen employer perception, expand regional visibility and design the application process so that interested professionals could get in touch more easily and clearly.
cases.approach: Together, staff recruitment was built as part of a clear system. This included a more authentic external presence, stronger visibility as an employer, a clear application pathway and a structure that specifically addresses and follows up with interested candidates.
cases.result_detail: Within 12 months, 138 applications were generated. In addition, Haus Hohensolms gGmbH became significantly more visible as an employer in the region and the application and hiring process was noticeably relieved.
cases.insight: When visibility, external image and the application process work together optimally, staff recruitment becomes much more predictable. That is exactly the difference between a single measure and a functioning system.

cases.result_detail: Before: No digital presence, barely any applications. After: Clearer positioning, social media setup and targeted campaign strategy brought predictable application volumes.
Local employer brand strengthened, professional external image established and recruiting process structured. Result: Higher quality of applications.

cta.title: Similar results for your organisation?
cta.text: Let us check in a short intro call which levers really work for you.
